04

About Me

I'm a Rutgers Accounting student and U.S. CPA candidate, currently interning at Brookfield Asset Management in New York, supporting real estate fund operations. I bridge the gap between traditional finance and modern technology — building AI workflows and data tools that make complex fund analysis more efficient.

Beyond the spreadsheets, I'm a semi-professional table tennis player who started competing at age 5 in Nanning, China, and a former varsity goalkeeper who helped win a Florida state championship. I believe the discipline and precision of athletics translates directly into financial work.
